postReview.title: Spain 1-0 Italy: Calafiori own goal wins Group B for brilliant Roja
postReview.description: Riccardo Calafiori's own goal proved decisive as Spain beat Italy 1-0 in their second match at Euro 2024, securing top spot in Group B.
